titleStmt.title: SII 18.158: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 158. (B.K. No. 130 of 1933-34.) BIJĀPUR, BIJAPUR TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription, which refers itself to the reign of Trailōkyamalladēva, is dated in the 5th year of his reign Śrīmukha, Pushya Pūrṇimā, Friday, Lunar eclipse, corresponding regularly to A.D. 1154, January 1, Friday.

It records a grant of certain taxes made for the worship of god Narasiṁhadēva of Vijayāpura by Kēs11iyaṇa-Nāyaka and other Karaṇas, subordinates of Bijjaḷa (of the Kalachurya family), who is stated to be a subordinate of Trailōkyamalla. Mahāpradhāna, Sēnādhipati and Daṇḍanāyaka Chillaṇayya, a subordinate of Bijjala, is stated to be governing Taddevāḍi one-thousand. The record is damaged.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
jayatu jagadadhīśaḥ śrīvadhūjīvitēśassakaḷaguṇanidhāna
gīrvvāṇanāthaḥ duritanikhiḷadūrō
dēvadēvō mukuṁdaḥ . śrīnarasiṁhāya namaḥ
© svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīpṛthvīvallabha mahārājādhirā
ja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḻatiḻa
kaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇa śrīmattraiḷōkyamalladēvara
vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhipravarddhamānamācaṁ
drārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttaṁ kalyāṇada nelevīḍinoḷu sukha
saṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamire . tatpādapadmōpajīvi
© cōḷataḻaprahāri maleyāḷakuḻapraḷeyaṁ varā
ḻapāṁcāḷakautūhaḷaṁ magadhamāḻavanirddaḷanaṁ kaḻiṁganēpāḷa
baḻa bharadiṁ naḍetaṁda bijjabhūpāḻakanenal saṁbhrama me
śatrunṛpāḻara maṁḍaḻaṁgaḻoḷ . tatpādapadmōpajīvi . © .
viśvajanapramōdamuditōditamāgire rājyalakṣmīyaṁ sāśva
tavāge tōḻvaladudagravenalu nijaṁ pūjitājñe saptāśva
tējamaṁ nilise permmeyanārjjisidaṁ pratāpalaṁkēśvara
maṇḍaḷēśana camūpati cillaṇadaṇḍanāyakaṁ . Enisi negaḻda
śrīmanmahāpradhānaṁ sēnādhipati daṇḍanāyakaṁ cillaṇayyaṁ ta
ddevāḍi sāyiramaṁ duṣṭanigrahaśiṣṭapratipāḷanadiṁ tribhōgābhyaṁ
taravāḻdarasugeyyuttamiḻdu tatpramukhakaraṇaṁgaḻu kēśi
yaṇanāyaka śrīdharanāyaka kahnaradēva gaṇapatinā
yakanuṁ suṁkaverggaḍe mallidēvanu patihitaṁ taḻeda
sōvaṇanuṁ seṭṭi dāvaṇanuvintinibaru
© svasti śrīmaccāḷukyatrailōkyamallavarṣada 5 neya śrīmu
khasaṁvatsarada puśyapuṇnami sukravāra sō
magrahaṇaparvva nimittaṁ śrīmadrājadhāni vijeyā
purada śrīnarasiṁhadēvara paṁcaparvva caitrapavitra ni
vēdya pūjāriya grāsavintinitakkaṁ kke naḍevantu
jayyaṁgaḷa magaṁ sōvaṇanu
dāvaṇanuṁ dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍibiṭṭaru taḷada bhatta
ge hejjuṁka ya suṁka soḷasa
ṟida hejjuṁka soḷasa
katteya hēṟiṁga hejjuṁka so
so 1 Aḍake hejjuṁka ṟike E
le hēṟiṁge vīsa suṁka gaṁdhavaṇa hoṁge
ṁge tiṁgaḷiṁge ṭṭa 1 ka 2 Uppinamōḷege
© svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēta vasundharāṁ ṣaṣṭiva
riṣasahasrāṇi miṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi .
Digital edition of SII 18.158 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
